summary: Iteration 38: Phase 5B Relationship Graph API + Related Products testing complete. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend Related Products section displays correctly with 3 labeled buckets. Admin password change verified (new password works, old password fails). One data consistency issue found: Related products API returns products that don't exist in public catalog.

minor.issue: Returns products (e.g., mboss-screw-system) that don't pass PILOT_FILTER and return 404 on product detail endpoint. Related API uses semantic_confidence >= 0.85 but product detail uses mapping_confidence: high filter.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking on some related product cards (e.g., mboss-screw-system) shows 'Product not found' toast because the product doesn't exist in public catalog. This is caused by backend data consistency issue.

action_items: Fix data consistency: Related products API should only return products that also pass PILOT_FILTER (mapping_confidence: high) to ensure all returned products are accessible via product detail endpoint
critical_code_review_comments: catalog.py line 531-538: Related products query uses semantic_confidence >= 0.85 but doesn't check mapping_confidence: high. This causes products to be returned that don't exist in public catalog.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (Related Products section works, but some related items link to non-existent products)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5B adds relationship-based Related Products to product detail pages. Key test slugs: 2.4mm-lps-distal-radial-volar-buttress-plate (AURIC, shows MBOSS screws + ARMAR alternatives), pfrn-proximal-femoral-rotational-stability-nail (CLAVO, shows MBOSS screws), biomime-aura-sirolimus-eluting-coronary-stent-system (non-enriched, empty buckets). Admin password changed from 'admin' to 'kOpcELYcEvkVtyDAE5-2uw'. Data consistency issue: Related API returns products that don't pass PILOT_FILTER.
